page_metadata.biotools__summary: A program for building macromolecular models from crystallograpgic data. It builds proteins, RNA/DNA, seqondary structure, side chains, loops, solvent and ligands
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A program for building macromolecular models from crystallograpgic data. It builds proteins, RNA/DNA, seqondary structure, side chains, loops, solvent and ligands
